name: multicast-notification-service
description: OAS (Swagger v3) API Definition for Template API

scripts.publish: mkdir -p build && redocly bundle specification/multicast-notification-service.yaml --dereferenced --remove-unused-components --ext json | poetry run python scripts/set_version.py > build/multicast-notification-service.json
scripts.serve: redocly build-docs build/multicast-notification-service.json -o build/index.html && python -m http.server 5000 --directory build

author: NHS Digital
